title: Vehicle Rental Fee Analyzer
category: Scanner, Methods, If-Else, Switch, Exception Handling
description: Create a simple Java console-based application that analyzes a vehicle rental transaction based on rental days, driver age, vehicle code, and rental fee.

easy.summary: Input customer name, driver age, and vehicle code. Display driver category and vehicle type.
requirements: Use clear input prompts, for example Enter Customer Name:, Enter Driver Age:, and Enter Vehicle Code:.
Display the required output values clearly after all inputs are processed.
Ask for customer name, driver age, and vehicle code.
Determine the driver category using getDriverCategory(int age).
Determine the vehicle type using getVehicleType(String vehicleCode).
Use if-else for driver category and switch for vehicle code.

medium.summary: Add rental days and display rental duration category.
requirements: Add an input for number of rental days.
Display rental days and rental duration category.
Add number of rental days as a new input.
Determine the rental duration category using getRentalDurationCategory(int days).

hard.summary: Calculate rental fee using the vehicle type's daily rate and display the complete rental result.
requirements: Display daily rate and rental fee.
Display the complete vehicle rental result.
Determine the daily rate using getDailyRate(String vehicleCode).
Calculate rental fee using rental days * daily rate.
Use daily rates: CAR=1500, SUV=2500, VAN=3000, MC=800, invalid code=0.
Display the complete vehicle rental result.
